title: Form Input Handling
description: Build a controlled form input with useReducer. Display the typed value live as the user types.
checklist: Display entered text below the input
verificationKeywords: onChange={(e) => dispatch({ type: SET_INPUT, payload: e.target.value })}

hints.guide: // guide hints: Import: import React, { useReducer } from react
// guide hints: Define SET_INPUT action type and initialState
// guide hints: Reducer updates input from action.payload
// guide hints: useReducer with reducer and initialState
// guide hints: Controlled input with value=state.input
hints.code: <input value={state.input} onChange={(e) => dispatch({ type: SET_INPUT, payload: e.target.value })} />

hints.guide: // guide hints: Show Entered Text below the input
// guide hints: Export: export default FormInput;
